settings.custom_liquid: 📌 Made in USA

settings.heading: Engraving Ideas
settings.content:
First Letter (A+B, A C B)

Names on each heart (Emma / Ross)

Special Date (01/05/2014)

Roman Date (V.XVI.MMXX)

Romantic Sayings, one on each heart:

Forever / & Always

You & Me / Forever

I Love You / Forever

You can use letters, numbers, roman numerals, and symbols(♥❤♡✿❀✽✪★✯☆☘☾∞) but emojis are not possible. The preview serves as an orientation, deviations are possible. It's best to keep the amount of words as little as possible to ensure the engraving is easy to read

settings.heading: How do I order?
settings.content:
- Select the color of ring and rose box you'd like

- Upload the photo you'd like on the bracelet by clicking "Upload Photo Here"

- Upload the photo you'd like on the bracelet by clicking "Upload Photo Here"

settings.heading: It says my image is too small!
settings.content:
It says my image is too small!

No problem at all! We require atleast 800 pixels width and atleast 800 pixels height to ensure it comes out with high quality.

You can resize your image here

*Make sure height and width are both set at at least 800 pixels*

settings.heading: Shipping information
settings.content:
All orders are expertly packaged, prepared, and shipped within 1-3 days of ordering. Please note that each of our bracelets are custom and handmade, and take us some time to create and package each order.

We offer Fast Shipping Worldwide and the typical delivery timeframe is 3-12 days. Depending on your location, you may receive items later or earlier.

All orders are shipped with the tracking number so you can track them every step of the way! Occasionally, packages may face delays beyond our control, such as customs or postal delays so please kindly understand. 

If you have any issues tracking your order, please reach out to us at 'support@oribask.com'

settings.heading: 30-Day Money Back Guarantee
settings.content: We think that our products make a difference in people's lives, and we stand behind them completely. All of our items come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. We will do everything we can to ensure you have a positive experience with Oribask!

settings.heading: Product Origins and Shipping?
settings.row_content: We only source merchandise from socially responsible businesses with ethical manufacturing practices. Our branded products are manufactured in the United States & China. Depending on your location we ship our products from one of three international warehouses, we have a warehouse in China, Australia and the United States.

settings.heading: MATERIALS & WARRANTY
settings.row_content:
• Wash and Care: Hand wash only
  • Stainless Steel
  • Comes in custom gift box
  • Innovative anti-tarnish protective coating
  • Water, sweat and heat-resistant
  • Nickel free

settings.heading: Have an unlisted question. Can you help?
settings.row_content: Absolutely, please contact us through the contact form to promptly receive a reply regarding your order, our time works 7 days a week for your satisfaction.
